positive: Minimalist abstract illustration of a celestial creature: a majestic, stylized lunar fox with flowing, iridescent fur, leaping gracefully over a cosmic nebula composed of vibrant sapphire blue and deep violet inks. The fox leaves a trail of golden stardust. The overall design must feature clean, thick silhouettes suitable for a center-chest apparel print. Use high contrast, limited color palette (metallic gold, sapphire, violet, black). Intricate linework, vector art style, perfect symmetry, flat graphic design, centered composition, print-friendly,
negative: artifacts, blurry, noisy, text, watermark, low resolution, bad anatomy, extra limbs, ugly, grainy, sketch, photo, 3d, realistic, logo, brand, trademark, signature
